description:
This quiz tests advanced skills in context engineering for AI systems, including managing context windows, token budgets, retrieval strategies, and prompt structure, with a challenging progression from basic to complex concepts. The tone is direct and practical, emphasizing real-world application over theoretical knowledge.
Topics: Context windows, Token budgets, Retrieval, Prompt structure, Failure modes in production AI systems
Audience: AI practitioners and developers with experience in LLMs, particularly those transitioning from demos to production systems or seeking deeper context management expertise.
